title.rendered: Dear Lottery Result Today 8 PM | 22 June 2026

content.rendered:
Looking for dear lottery result today 8 PM? You’re in the right place! We consistently update the dear lottery results here on this website, covering the morning, night, and evening draws, right here on this website every day.

The 8 PM draw offers a 1st prize of 1 crore, a 2nd prize of 9000 Rupees, a 3rd prize of 450 Rupees, a 4th prize of 250 Rupees, and a 5th prize of 120 Rupees. The results for today’s 8 PM draw in Nagaland can be found just below. Simply scroll down to see the outcome.

1:00 PM RESULT
6:00 PM RESULT
8:00 PM RESULT

Dear Lottery Result Today 8 PM

Dear Morning 8:00 PM Tickets

Dear Morning 8:00 PM Prize
